Na\u0161e kalkula\u010dka poskytuje p\u0: Our calculator provides mathematically precise estimations. Final terms will be specified in your loan agreement.
Celkov\u00e1 \u010d\u00e1stka p\u016fj\u: The total money borrowed for buying a property.
Celkov\u00e1 \u010d\u00e1stka splacen\u0: The total sum repaid to the bank, including principal, interest, and insurance.
Sazba, kterou si banka \u00fa\u010dtuje: The rate at which the bank charges for borrowing funds.
RPSN (ro\u010dn\u00ed procentn\u00ed saz: The RPSN (Roční procentní sazba nákladů) provides an annual illustration of the percentage rate of costs, showing the yearly percentage of the total amount owed. This covers installments, administrative charges, and additional costs associated with the loan. Please note that actual RPSN may vary among banks due to different additional expenses.
\u010c\u00e1stka placen\u00e1 ka\u017ed\: The amount paid each month for insurance coverage.
Zadejte po\u010det let trv\u00e1n\u00ed: Input the number of years for your mortgage term. This represents the duration over which you will be repaying your mortgage.
Do tohoto pole se zad\u00e1v\u00e1 p\u01: This field requires your estimated monthly mortgage payment. Enter the amount you expect to pay each month for your mortgage.
Zadejte aktu\u00e1ln\u00ed v\u00fd\u0161: Enter your current monthly rent amount in Czech Koruna (CZK). This will be used for comparison with potential mortgage costs.
Pokud o\u010dek\u00e1v\u00e1te, \u017ee: If you expect your rent to increase annually by a certain percentage, enter that estimated average yearly increase here. Leave this blank if you expect no rent adjustments.
Na\u0161e kalkula\u010dka poskytuje p\u0: Our calculator provides mathematically precise estimations. Final terms will be specified in your loan agreement.
RPSN (ro\u010dn\u00ed procentn\u00ed saz: The RPSN (Roční procentní sazba nákladů) provides an annual illustration of the percentage rate of costs, showing the yearly percentage of the total amount owed. This covers installments, administrative charges, and additional costs associated with the loan. Please note that actual RPSN may vary among banks due to different additional expenses.
Pro p\u0159\u00edjmy nad 500 000 K\u010d: For incomes over 500,000 CZK, please contact us for a personalized calculation.
Zadejte v\u0161echny pravideln\u00e9 m\u: Include all regular monthly loan payments - such as mortgage, personal loans, leasing, etc.
P\u0159i dob\u011b spl\u00e1cen\u00ed 30: Based on a 30-year mortgage term, your income, and your current loan obligations.
